texto: No lake so still but it has its wave.No circle so perfect but that it has its blur.I would change things for you if I could
autor: As I can't you must take them as they are.
explicacao: Citação de As I can't you must take them as they are. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “No lake so still but it has its wave.No circle so perfect but that it has its blur.I would change…” articula reflexao, confucius, still em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
